economic_notes: First Nation holds 33.33% interest in Wahkohtowin Development Limited Partnership (community economic development) and 33.33% interest in Three Nations Development LP (community economic development), both accounted for using modified equity method. Share of earnings from enterprises was $626,673.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 but audit report dated September 6, 2023 — over 17 months late. Four entities accounted for under modified equity method (not fully consolidated): Wahkohtowin Development Limited Partnership, Wahkohtowin Development LP GP, Three Nations Development LP, and 2454357 Ontario Inc. Large 'Other' revenue of $7,343,650 vs prior year $2,528,351 — significant increase likely driven by impact benefit agreement receipts or trust fund activity; Funding held in trust receivable jumped from $215,393 to $4,194,094. Goldcorp Borden Limited deferred revenue of $3,045,888 in 2021 reduced to $0 in 2022, suggesting recognition of those funds. Advances from Land Claim Trust of $1,137,191 remain outstanding. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Nation located near Chapleau, Ontario.
